dd_plot_19
library(cowplot)

combined_plot<- plot_grid(dd_plot_1, dd_plot_2, dd_plot_3, dd_plot_4, dd_plot_5, dd_plot_6, dd_plot_7, dd_plot_8, dd_plot_9, dd_plot_10, dd_plot_11, dd_plot_12, dd_plot_13, dd_plot_14, dd_plot_15, dd_plot_16, dd_plot_17, dd_plot_18, dd_plot_19, ncol=4, nrow = 5, align="v") +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(b = 15, l=15, unit = "pt"))

combined_plot

final_plot <- ggdraw(combined_plot) +
  draw_label("Health Condition", x = 0.5, y=0.0, size = 14, vjust = -0.5) +
  draw_label("Relative Abundance", x = 0, y = 0.5, angle = 90, size = 14, vjust = 1.5)

final_plot

pdf("combined_relative_abundance_plots_updated.pdf", width=8, height=8)
final_plot
dev.off()

Since we redid the DESeq2 results, let’s now recheck if any of these match with the Blast matches

common_asvs<- intersect(iden_seqs, sig_dif_asvs)

#Can we get Taxonomy for these matches?

sequence_matches<- sequences[names(sequences) %in% tidy_blast_100$qseqid]

tax<- as.data.frame(ps_f2@tax_table)
tax_of_matches<- tax[rownames(tax) %in% sequence_matches,]

tax_of_common_asvs<- tax_of_matches[rownames(tax_of_matches) %in% common_asvs,]

Now let’s figure out which ASVs were the same between the DESeq2, the BLAST, and the indicator analysis.

asvs_shared<- tax_of_common_asvs[rownames(tax_of_common_asvs) %in% rownames(dd_ind_asvs_w_tax),]

#How many of the indicator species are considered differentially enriched by DESeq2?
length(sig_dif_asvs)
asvs_indics_enriched<- sig_dif_asvs[rownames(dd_ind_asvs_w_tax) %in% sig_dif_asvs]

#13 differentially enriched taxa were indicators of FLP

dd_melt_shared<- dd_melt[dd_melt$OTU %in% asvs_indics_enriched,]
dd_melt_shared<- dd_melt_shared[dd_melt_shared$OTU %in% common_asvs,]

length(unique(dd_melt_shared$OTU))

OK that got a little confusing, let’s try this again

indic_asvs<- rownames(dd_ind_asvs_w_tax)
enriched_asvs<- sig_dif_asvs
blast_asvs<- tidy_blast_100_no_repeats$sequence

shared_asvs<- intersect(intersect(indic_asvs, enriched_asvs), blast_asvs)

tax<- as.data.frame(ps_f2@tax_table)
tax_of_shared<- tax[rownames(tax) %in% shared_asvs,]
  
  # Remove specific samples
samples_to_remove <- c("DEPBlank3-14-24", "DEPBlank3-6-24")
ps_f2_pruned <- prune_samples(!(sample_names(ps_f2) %in% samples_to_remove), ps_f2)

ps_f2_pruned

ps_f2_ra <- transform_sample_counts(ps_f2_pruned, function(OTU) OTU/sum(OTU))

f2_pruned_ra_shared <- subset_taxa(ps_f2_ra, row.names(ps_f2_ra@tax_table) %in% shared_asvs)

f2_pruned_ra_shared

dd_melt_shared <- psmelt(f2_pruned_ra_shared)

palette2<- c("DD" = "#d1495b", "HD" = "#edae49", "HH" = "#00798c")

new_labels <- setNames(dd_melt_shared$Genus, dd_melt_shared$OTU)

unique_asvs<- unique(dd_melt_shared$OTU)

Let’s only do relative abundance plots of the four ASVs.

dd_melt_shared_1<- dd_melt_shared[dd_melt_shared$OTU == unique_asvs[1],]
print(unique_asvs[1])

custom_labels <- c("TACGGAGGGGGTTAGCGTTGTTCGGAATTACTGGGCGTAAAGCGCGCGTAGGCGGATTAGTAAGTTAGAGGTGAAATCCCGGGGCTCAACCCCGGAACTGCCTTTAATACTGCTAGTCTTGAGTTCGAGAGAGGTGAGTGGAATTCCGAGTGTAGAGGTGAAATTCGTAGATATTCGGAGGAACACCAGTGGCGAAGGCGGCTCACTGGCTCGATACTGACGCTGAGGTGCGAAAGTGTGGGGAGCAAACAGG" = "Thalassobius ASV36")

dd_plot_shared_1<- ggplot(dd_melt_shared_1, aes(x = Condition, y = Abundance, fill = Condition)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7,  outlier.shape=NA, aes(fill = Condition)) +
  geom_jitter(position=position_jitter(width=.1,height=0),aes(fill = Condition, colour="black"),size=4, pch=21, colour = "black")+
  labs(x = "Genus", y = "Relative Abundance", fill = "Condition") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  facet_wrap(~OTU, labeller = labeller(OTU = custom_labels)) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette2) +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank()) +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(color="black")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(color="black")) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  theme(axis.title.y = element_blank()) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank())

dd_plot_shared_1
dd_melt_shared_2<- dd_melt_shared[dd_melt_shared$OTU == unique_asvs[2],]

print(unique_asvs[2])

custom_labels <- c("TACGGAGGGTGCAAGCGTTACTCGGAATCACTGGGCGTAAAGAGCGTGTAGGCGGGTTAATAAGTCAGATGTGAAAGCCTATGGCTCAACCATAGAACTGCATTTGAAACTGTTAACCTAGAATATGGGAGAGGTAGATGGAATTTCTGGTGTAGGGGTAAAATCCGTAGAGATCAGAAGGAATACCGATTGCGAAGGCGATCTACTGGAACATTATTGACGCTGAGACGCGAAAGCGTGGGGAGCAAACAGG" = "Halarcobacter ASV25")


dd_plot_shared_2<- ggplot(dd_melt_shared_2, aes(x = Condition, y = Abundance, fill = Condition)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7,  outlier.shape=NA, aes(fill = Condition)) +
  geom_jitter(position=position_jitter(width=.1,height=0),aes(fill = Condition, colour="black"),size=4, pch=21, colour = "black")+
  labs(x = "Genus", y = "Relative Abundance", fill = "Condition") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +

  theme_classic() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette2) +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank()) +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(color="black")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(color="black")) +

  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank())

dd_plot_shared_2

print(unique_asvs[3])

custom_labels <- c("TACGGAGGGGGTTAGCGTTGTTCGGAATTACTGGGCGTAAAGCGCGCGTAGGCGGATTGGAAAGTTAGGGGTGAAATCCCAGGGCTCAACCCTGGAACTGCCCTTAAAACTCCCAGTCTAGAGTTCGAGAGAGGTGAGTGGAATTCCGAGTGTAGAGGTGAAATTCGTAGATATTCGGAGGAACACCAGTGGCGAAGGCGGCTCACTGGCTCGATACTGACGCTGAGGTGCGAAAGTGTGGGGAGCAAACAGG" = "Rhodobactereaceae ASV14")

  geom_jitter(position=position_jitter(width=.1,height=0),aes(fill = Condition, colour="black"),size=4, pch=21, colour = "black")+

print(unique_asvs[4])

dd_plot_shared_4<- ggplot(dd_melt_shared_4, aes(x = Condition, y = Abundance, fill = Condition)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7,  outlier.shape=NA, aes(fill = Condition)) +
  geom_jitter(position=position_jitter(width=.1,height=0),aes(fill = Condition, colour="black"),size=4, pch=21, colour = "black")+

dd_plot_shared_4

Let’s now make the plot!

combined_plot<- plot_grid(dd_plot_shared_1, dd_plot_shared_2, dd_plot_shared_3, dd_plot_shared_4, ncol=2, nrow = 2, align="v") +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(b = 15, l=15, unit = "pt"))

combined_plot

final_plot <- ggdraw(combined_plot) +
  draw_label("Health Condition", x = 0.5, y=0.0, size = 14, vjust = -0.5) +
  draw_label("Relative Abundance", x = 0, y = 0.5, angle = 90, size = 14, vjust = 1.5)

final_plot

pdf("combined_relative_abundance_plots_updated_only_common_asvs.pdf", width=8, height=6)
final_plot
dev.off()

Let’s redo the metacoder trees, but maybe we can filter out low abundance taxa?

#Healthy HH samples
obj_HH = parse_phyloseq(ps_f2_HH_pruned)

print(obj_HH$data$sample_data$sample_id)
print(obj_HH$data$tax_data$otu_id)
print(colnames(obj_HH$data$otu_table))

obj_HH$data$otu_props <- calc_obs_props(obj_HH, "otu_table", cols = obj_HH$data$sample_data$sample_id)

obj_HH$data$tax_abund <- calc_taxon_abund(obj_HH, "otu_props", cols = obj_HH$data$sample_data$sample_id)

obj_HH$data$tax_mean_prop <- calc_group_mean(obj_HH, data = "tax_abund",
                                          cols = obj_HH$data$sample_data$sample_id,
                                          groups = "mean_prop")

set.seed(123)
obj_HH %>% 
  filter_taxa(mean_prop > 0.002) %>%# subset to the order rank
  filter_taxa(taxon_ranks == "Order", supertaxa = TRUE) %>%
  heat_tree(node_label = taxon_names,
            node_size = mean_prop,
            node_color = ifelse(taxon_names == "Verrucomicrobiales", "#eae2b7", 
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Rickettsiales", "#118ab2",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Rhodobacterales", "#003049",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Pseudomonadales", "#287271",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Peptostreptococcales-Tissierellales", "#ef476f",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Oligoflexales", "#d62828",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Mycoplasmatales", "#fcbf49",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Gracilibacteria", "#06d6a0",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Bacteroidales", "#83d483", 
                              "gray"))))))))),
            initial_layout = "re", layout = "da",
            title = "HH",
            output_file = "metacoder_HH_plot_order_RA.pdf")
#Healthy HH samples
obj_DD = parse_phyloseq(ps_f2_DD_pruned)

print(obj_DD$data$sample_data$sample_id)
print(obj_DD$data$tax_data$otu_id)
print(colnames(obj_DD$data$otu_table))

obj_DD$data$otu_props <- calc_obs_props(obj_DD, "otu_table", cols = obj_DD$data$sample_data$sample_id)

obj_DD$data$tax_abund <- calc_taxon_abund(obj_DD, "otu_props", cols = obj_DD$data$sample_data$sample_id)

obj_DD$data$tax_mean_prop <- calc_group_mean(obj_DD, data = "tax_abund",
                                          cols = obj_DD$data$sample_data$sample_id,
                                          groups = "mean_prop")
cols <- c("Rhodobacterales"="#003049", "Oligoflexales"="#d62828", "Flavobacteriales" = "#f77f00", "Mycoplasmatales" = "#fcbf49", "Verrucomicrobiales" = "#eae2b7", "Pseudomonadales" = "#287271", "Peptostreptococcales-Tissierellales" = "#ef476f", "Rickettsiales" = "#118ab2", "Gracilibacteria" = "#06d6a0", "Bacteroidales" = "#83d483")

set.seed(123)
obj_DD %>% 
  filter_taxa(mean_prop > 0.002) %>%# subset to the order rank
  filter_taxa(taxon_ranks == "Order", supertaxa = TRUE) %>%
  heat_tree(node_label = taxon_names,
            node_size = mean_prop,
            node_color = ifelse(taxon_names == "Verrucomicrobiales", "#eae2b7", 
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Rickettsiales", "#118ab2",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Rhodobacterales", "#003049",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Pseudomonadales", "#287271",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Peptostreptococcales-Tissierellales", "#ef476f",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Oligoflexales", "#d62828",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Mycoplasmatales", "#fcbf49",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Gracilibacteria", "#06d6a0",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Bacteroidales", "#83d483", 
                              "gray"))))))))),
            initial_layout = "re", layout = "da",
            title = "DD",
            output_file = "metacoder_DD_plot_order_RA.pdf")
set.seed(123)

taxa_to_keep <- c("Verrucomicrobiales", "Verrucomicrobiae", "Verrucomicrobiota", "Rickettsiales", "Rhodobacterales", "Alphaproteobacteria","Proteobacteria", "Pseudomonadales", "Gammaproteobacteria", "Peptostreptococcales-Tissierellales","Clostridia" , "Firmicutes", "Oligoflexales", "Oligoflexia", "Bdellovibrionota", "Mycoplasmatales", "Gracilibacteria")

order_to_hide <- "Gammaproteobacteria" 

obj_HH %>% 
  filter_taxa(mean_prop > 0.002) %>%# subset to the order rank
  filter_taxa(taxon_ranks == "Order", supertaxa = TRUE) %>%
  heat_tree(node_label = ifelse((taxon_names %in% taxa_to_keep) & !(taxon_ranks == "Order" & taxon_names == order_to_hide), taxon_names, ""),
            node_size = mean_prop,
            make_node_legend = FALSE,
            node_size_digits = 1,
            node_size_axis_label = "Mean Abundance",
            node_size_range = c(0.013, 0.08),
            node_label_size_range = c(0.02, 0.04), 
            repel_labels = TRUE,
            overlap_avoidance = 4 ,
            node_color = ifelse(taxon_names == "Verrucomicrobiales", "#eae2b7",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Verrucomicrobiae", "#eae2b7",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Verrucomicrobiota", "#eae2b7",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Rickettsiales", "#118ab2",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Rhodobacterales", "#caf0f8",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Alphaproteobacteria" & taxon_ranks=="Class", "#caf0f8",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Proteobacteria", "#caf0f8",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Pseudomonadales", "#287271",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Gammaproteobacteria" & taxon_ranks=="Class", "#287271",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Peptostreptococcales-Tissierellales", "#ef476f",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Clostridia" & taxon_ranks=="Class", "#ef476f",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Firmicutes", "#ef476f",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Oligoflexales", "#d62828",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Oligoflexia", "#d62828",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Bdellovibrionota", "#d62828",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Mycoplasmatales", "#fcbf49",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Gracilibacteria", "#06d6a0",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Bacteroidales", "#83d483", 
                              "gray")))))))))))))))))),
            initial_layout = "re", layout = "da",
            title = "Healthy Tissue",
            output_file = "metacoder_HH_plot_order_RA_colored.pdf")
set.seed(123)

taxa_to_label <- c("Verrucomicrobiales", "Verrucomicrobiae", "Verrucomicrobiota", "Rickettsiales", "Rhodobacterales", "Alphaproteobacteria","Proteobacteria", "Pseudomonadales", "Gammaproteobacteria", "Peptostreptococcales-Tissierellales","Clostridia" , "Firmicutes", "Oligoflexales", "Oligoflexia", "Bdellovibrionota", "Mycoplasmatales", "Gracilibacteria", "Bacteroidales", "Bacteroidota", "Bacteroidia")

gamma_hide <- c("Gammaproteobacteria")
alpha_hide<- "Alphaproteobacteria"
clos_hide<- "Clostridia"

obj_DD %>% 
  filter_taxa(mean_prop > 0.002) %>%# subset to the order rank
  filter_taxa(taxon_ranks == "Order", supertaxa = TRUE) %>%
  heat_tree(node_label = ifelse((taxon_names %in% taxa_to_label) & !(taxon_ranks == "Order" & (taxon_names == gamma_hide | taxon_names == alpha_hide | taxon_names == clos_hide)), taxon_names, ""),
            node_size = mean_prop,
            make_node_legend = FALSE,
            node_size_digits = 1,
            node_size_axis_label = "Mean Abundance",
            node_size_range = c(0.013, 0.08),
            node_label_size_range = c(0.02, 0.04), 
            repel_labels = TRUE,
            overlap_avoidance = 4 ,
            node_color = ifelse(taxon_names == "Verrucomicrobiales", "#eae2b7",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Verrucomicrobiae", "#eae2b7",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Verrucomicrobiota", "#eae2b7",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Rickettsiales", "#118ab2",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Rhodobacterales", "#caf0f8",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Alphaproteobacteria" & taxon_ranks=="Class", "#caf0f8",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Proteobacteria", "#caf0f8",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Pseudomonadales", "#287271",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Gammaproteobacteria" & taxon_ranks=="Class", "#287271",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Peptostreptococcales-Tissierellales", "#ef476f",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Clostridia" & taxon_ranks=="Class", "#ef476f",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Firmicutes", "#ef476f",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Oligoflexales", "#d62828",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Oligoflexia", "#d62828",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Bdellovibrionota", "#d62828",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Mycoplasmatales", "#fcbf49",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Gracilibacteria", "#06d6a0",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Bacteroidales", "#83d483",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Bacteroidota", "#83d483",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Bacteroidia", "#83d483",
                              "gray")))))))))))))))))))),
            initial_layout = "re", layout = "da",
            title = "Disease Lesion",
            output_file = "metacoder_DD_plot_order_RA_colored.pdf")

Now make combined plot.

hh_plot<- obj_HH %>% 
  filter_taxa(mean_prop > 0.002) %>%# subset to the order rank
  filter_taxa(taxon_ranks == "Order", supertaxa = TRUE) %>%
  heat_tree(node_label = ifelse((taxon_names %in% taxa_to_keep) & !(taxon_ranks == "Order" & taxon_names == order_to_hide), taxon_names, ""),
            node_size = mean_prop,
            make_node_legend = FALSE,
            node_size_digits = 1,
            node_size_axis_label = "Mean Abundance",
            node_size_range = c(0.013, 0.08),
            node_label_size_range = c(0.03, 0.05), 
            repel_labels = TRUE,
            overlap_avoidance = 3,
            node_color = ifelse(taxon_names == "Verrucomicrobiales", "#eae2b7",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Verrucomicrobiae", "#eae2b7",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Verrucomicrobiota", "#eae2b7",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Rickettsiales", "#118ab2",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Rhodobacterales", "#caf0f8",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Alphaproteobacteria" & taxon_ranks=="Class", "#caf0f8",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Proteobacteria", "#caf0f8",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Pseudomonadales", "#287271",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Gammaproteobacteria" & taxon_ranks=="Class", "#287271",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Peptostreptococcales-Tissierellales", "#ef476f",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Clostridia" & taxon_ranks=="Class", "#ef476f",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Firmicutes", "#ef476f",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Oligoflexales", "#d62828",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Oligoflexia", "#d62828",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Bdellovibrionota", "#d62828",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Mycoplasmatales", "#fcbf49",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Gracilibacteria", "#06d6a0",
                              "gray"))))))))))))))))),
            initial_layout = "re", layout = "da")

dd_plot<- obj_DD %>% 
  filter_taxa(mean_prop > 0.002) %>%# subset to the order rank
  filter_taxa(taxon_ranks == "Order", supertaxa = TRUE) %>%
  heat_tree(node_label = ifelse((taxon_names %in% taxa_to_label) & !(taxon_ranks == "Order" & (taxon_names == gamma_hide | taxon_names == alpha_hide | taxon_names == clos_hide)), taxon_names, ""),
            node_size = mean_prop,
            make_node_legend = FALSE,
            node_size_digits = 1,
            node_size_axis_label = "Mean Abundance",
            node_size_range = c(0.013, 0.08),
            node_label_size_range = c(0.03, 0.05), 
            repel_labels = TRUE,
            overlap_avoidance = 5,
            node_color = ifelse(taxon_names == "Verrucomicrobiales", "#eae2b7",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Verrucomicrobiae", "#eae2b7",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Verrucomicrobiota", "#eae2b7",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Rickettsiales", "#118ab2",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Rhodobacterales", "#caf0f8",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Alphaproteobacteria" & taxon_ranks=="Class", "#caf0f8",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Proteobacteria", "#caf0f8",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Pseudomonadales", "#287271",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Gammaproteobacteria" & taxon_ranks=="Class", "#287271",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Peptostreptococcales-Tissierellales", "#ef476f",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Clostridia" & taxon_ranks=="Class", "#ef476f",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Firmicutes", "#ef476f",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Oligoflexales", "#d62828",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Oligoflexia", "#d62828",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Bdellovibrionota", "#d62828",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Mycoplasmatales", "#fcbf49",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Gracilibacteria", "#06d6a0",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Bacteroidales", "#83d483",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Bacteroidota", "#83d483",
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Bacteroidia", "#83d483",
                              "gray")))))))))))))))))))),
            initial_layout = "re", layout = "da")

library(gridExtra)

grid.arrange(hh_plot, dd_plot, nrow = 1)  # Adjust nrow/ncol for layout

library(patchwork)

# Combine plots with annotations
combined_plot <- hh_plot + dd_plot 

print(combined_plot)

pdf("comparative_metacoder_trees.pdf", width = 12, height = 8)
combined_plot
dev.off()

Now to make them colored by relative abundance

set.seed(123)
obj_HH %>% 
  filter_taxa(mean_prop > 0.002) %>%# subset to the order rank
  filter_taxa(taxon_ranks == "Order", supertaxa = TRUE) %>%
  heat_tree(node_label = taxon_names,
            node_size = mean_prop,
            node_color = ifelse(taxon_names == "Verrucomicrobiales", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Verrucomicrobiae", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Verrucomicrobiota", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Rickettsiales", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Rhodobacterales", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Alphaproteobacteria" & taxon_ranks=="Class", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Proteobacteria", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Pseudomonadales", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Gammaproteobacteria" & taxon_ranks=="Class", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Peptostreptococcales-Tissierellales", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Clostridia" & taxon_ranks=="Class", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Firmicutes", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Oligoflexales", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Oligoflexia", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Bdellovibrionota", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Mycoplasmatales", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Gracilibacteria", mean_prop,
                              "gray"))))))))))))))))),
            initial_layout = "re", layout = "da",
            title = "HH",
            output_file = "metacoder_HH_plot_order_RA_coloredRA.pdf")
set.seed(123)
obj_DD %>% 
  filter_taxa(mean_prop > 0.002) %>%
  filter_taxa(taxon_ranks == "Order", supertaxa = TRUE) %>%
  heat_tree(node_label = taxon_names,
            node_size = mean_prop,
            make_node_legend = TRUE,
            node_color = ifelse(taxon_names == "Verrucomicrobiales", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Verrucomicrobiae", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Verrucomicrobiota", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Rickettsiales", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Rhodobacterales", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Alphaproteobacteria" & taxon_ranks=="Class", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Proteobacteria", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Pseudomonadales", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Gammaproteobacteria" & taxon_ranks=="Class", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Peptostreptococcales-Tissierellales", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Clostridia" & taxon_ranks=="Class", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Firmicutes", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Oligoflexales", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Oligoflexia", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Bdellovibrionota", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Mycoplasmatales", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Gracilibacteria", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Bacteroidales", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Bacteroidia", mean_prop,
                       ifelse(taxon_names == "Bacteroidota", mean_prop,
                              "gray")))))))))))))))))))),
            initial_layout = "re", layout = "da",
            title = "DD",
            output_file = "metacoder_DD_plot_order_RA_colored.pdf")
ps_f2_ra #183 ASVs in 132 samples

ps_f2_ra_genus<- tax_glom(ps_f2_ra, taxrank = "Genus")
ps_f2_ra_genus_df <- as.data.frame(t(otu_table(ps_f2_ra_genus)))
mean_abund <- rowMeans(ps_f2_ra_genus_df)
top_15 <- names(sort(mean_abund, decreasing = TRUE))[1:15]
ps_top15_genus <- prune_taxa(top_15, ps_f2_ra_genus)
melted_data <- psmelt(ps_top15_genus)

#Assign colors per phylum
length(unique(melted_data$Phylum))
unique(melted_data$Phylum)
unique(melted_data$Genus)

cols <- c("Bacteroidota"="#2A9D8F","Cyanobacteria"="#264653","Proteobacteria"="#E9C46A",
          "Firmicutes"="#F4A261", "Bdellovibrionota" = "#9a031e")
library(stringr)

pdf("Bubbleplot_Top15_Genera.pdf",width=20,height=8.5)
bubplot <- ggplot(melted_data, aes(x=Sample, y=Genus, size=Abundance, fill=Phylum))+
  geom_point(shape=21)+
  scale_size(range = c(0, 17), name="Relative Abundance")+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())+
  facet_grid(.~fct_relevel(Condition, "HH", "HD", "DD"), scales = "free_x", space = "free_x")+
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols, labels = c("Bacteroidota", "Bdellovibrionota", "Cyanobacteria", "Firmicutes", "Proteobacteria")) +
  theme(strip.background = element_blank())+
  xlab("Coral") +
  ylab("Lowest Taxonomic Assignment") +
  theme(panel.grid.major=element_line(linetype=1,color="grey"),
        panel.background = element_blank()) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 22, face = "bold")) +
  theme(strip.background =element_rect(fill="white"))+
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"))+
  theme(strip.text = element_text(size = 22))+
  theme(axis.title.y = element_text(size = 22, face = "bold"))+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 22, face = "bold"))+
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size=18, color = "black"))+
  theme(legend.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"))+
  theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 18))+
  guides(fill = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size=7.5, vjust=30.5))) +
  theme(panel.border = element_blank()) +
  theme(panel.spacing = unit(1, "lines")) +
  theme(strip.background = element_blank())

bubplot
dev.off()

We were asked by folks in the FLP group to look at the functional profiles of the microbes and really focus on the nitrogen cycling bacteria. So we are going to run the ASVs through PICRUST2 on the HiperGator. In order to do this, we need to transpose the OTU table and then write it out as a tab-delimited file.

ps_f2_otu_table<- t(otu_ps_f2)
rownames(ps_f2_otu_table) <- paste0("ASV", seq_len(nrow(ps_f2_otu_table)))
write.table(ps_f2_otu_table, "ps_f2_otu_table.txt", sep="\t",col.names=TRUE)

ps_f2_otu_table<- as.data.frame(ps_f2_otu_table)
library(readr)
write.table(ps_f2_otu_table, "ps_f2_otu_table.tsv", sep = "\t", row.names = TRUE, quote = FALSE)

##DESeq Diseased Corals with and Without SCTLD History

ps_f2
ps_fs_sctld_flp<- subset_samples(ps_f2, Condition=="DD")
ps_f2_sctld_flp<- subset_samples(ps_fs_sctld_flp, Disease_History == "SCTLD" | Disease_History == "FLP_only")

ps_f2_sctld_flp

ps_f2_sctld_flp_pruned <- prune_taxa(taxa_sums(ps_f2_sctld_flp) > 0, ps_f2_sctld_flp)
ps_f2_sctld_flp_pruned

# Define the order of the conditions for testing
# In this order, the positive fold change values are increased in Diseased Tissue
sample_data(ps_f2_sctld_flp_pruned)$Disease_History<-factor(sample_data(ps_f2_sctld_flp_pruned)$Disease_History,levels=c("SCTLD","FLP_only"))
head(sample_data(ps_f2_sctld_flp_pruned)$Disease_History, 10)

# DESEQ2 analysis on Dcyl Samples
dds = phyloseq_to_deseq2(ps_f2_sctld_flp_pruned, ~ Disease_History)
dds
#filter rows with very few counts
dds <- dds[ rowSums(counts(dds)) > 5, ]
cts <- counts(dds)
geoMeans <- apply(cts, 1, function(row) if (all(row == 0)) 0 else exp(mean(log(row[row != 0]))))
dds <- estimateSizeFactors(dds, geoMeans=geoMeans)
dds <- DESeq(dds,test="Wald", fitType="parametric")
res = results(dds, cooksCutoff = FALSE)
alpha = 0.01
sigtab = res[which(res$padj < alpha), ]
sigtab = cbind(as(sigtab, "data.frame"), as(tax_table(ps)[rownames(sigtab), ], "matrix"))
head(sigtab)
dim(sigtab)
#save table of results
sig = as(sigtab, "matrix")
write.table(sig,"DESeq2_results_SCTLD_FLP_Only.txt",sep="\t",col.names=NA)
sig_dif<- read.table("DESeq2_results_SCTLD_FLP_Only.txt", header = TRUE)
colnames(sig_dif)[1]<- "ASV"

#Count how many orders
orders<-unique(sig_dif$Order)
print(orders)

order_cols<-c("Rhodospirillales"="#f47068", "Bacteroidales" = "#ffb3ae"  ,            "Pseudomonadales"  = "#fff4f1",  "Verrucomicrobiales" = "#1697a6",        
"Absconditabacteriales (SR1)"= "#0e606b","Rhizobiales" = "#ffc24b")  


#Create Figure for Significantly Different Taxa
pdf("Figure_DETaxa_SCTLD_FLP.pdf",width=11,height=8)
p1 <- ggplot(sig_dif,aes(log2FoldChange,Genus,fill=Order))+
  geom_point(size=5, shape=21)+
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin=log2FoldChange-lfcSE, xmax=log2FoldChange+lfcSE),height=0.2)+
  scale_fill_manual(values=order_cols)+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face="italic"))+
  labs(y= "Lowest Taxonomic Assignment")+
  theme(axis.title=element_text(size=14))+
  theme(legend.text=element_text(size=14))+
  theme(legend.title=element_text(size=16))+
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14, color="black"))+
  theme(legend.position = "right")+
  geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype="dashed") +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank())
p1
dev.off()
ps_f2_sctld_flp_pruned_ra<- transform_sample_counts(ps_f2_sctld_flp_pruned, function(x) x / sum(x))
sctld_flp_melt <- psmelt(ps_f2_sctld_flp_pruned_ra)

flp_vs_sctld_asvs<- sig_dif$ASV

filtered_phyloseq <- prune_taxa(flp_vs_sctld_asvs, ps_f2_sctld_flp_pruned_ra)
filtered_phyloseq <- prune_taxa(taxa_sums(filtered_phyloseq) > 0, filtered_phyloseq)

filtered_phyloseq

sctld_flp_melt <- psmelt(filtered_phyloseq)

##Make plot

sctld_flp_1<- sctld_flp_melt[sctld_flp_melt$OTU == flp_vs_sctld_asvs[1],]
print(flp_vs_sctld_asvs[1])

custom_labels <- c("TACGAAGGGAGCAAGCGTTGTTCGGAATTACTGGGCGTAAAGGGCGTGTAGGCGGATTATCAAGTTAGGGGTGAAATCCCGGGGCTCAACCTCGGCACTGCCTTTAAGACTGATAATCTAGAGTATGTGAGGGGATGATGGAATACCTAGTGTAGAGGTGAAATTCGTAGATATTAGGTGGAACACCAGTGGCGAAGGCGATTATCTGGCACATTACTGACGCTGAGGCGCGAAAGCGTGGGGAGCAAACGGG" = "Terasakiellaceae")

dd_plot_flp_sctld_1<- ggplot(sctld_flp_1, aes(x =Disease_History, y = Abundance, fill = Disease_History)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7,  outlier.shape=NA, aes(fill = Disease_History)) +
  geom_jitter(position=position_jitter(width=.1,height=0),aes(fill = Disease_History, colour="black"),size=4, pch=21, colour = "black")+
  labs(x = "Genus", y = "Relative Abundance", fill = "Disease_HIstory") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  facet_wrap(~OTU, labeller = labeller(OTU = custom_labels)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank()) +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(color="black")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(color="black")) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  theme(axis.title.y = element_blank()) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank())

dd_plot_flp_sctld_1
##Make plot

sctld_flp_2<- sctld_flp_melt[sctld_flp_melt$OTU == flp_vs_sctld_asvs[2],]
print(flp_vs_sctld_asvs[2])

custom_labels <- c("TACGGAGGGTGTAAGCGTTATCCGGATTTATTGGGTTTAAAGGGTACGTAGGCGGTAATATAAGTCAGTGGTGAAATCCTGCAGCTCAACTGTAGAACTGCCATTGAAACTGTATTACTTGAGTATACTTGAGGTAGGCGGAATGAGTAGTGTAGCGGTGAAATGCTTAGATATTACTCAGAACACCGATTGCGAAGGCAGCTTACTAAGGTATAACTGACGCTGATGTACGAAAGCGTGGGGAGCGAACAGG" = "Roseimarinus")

dd_plot_flp_sctld_2<- ggplot(sctld_flp_2, aes(x =Disease_History, y = Abundance, fill = Disease_History)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7,  outlier.shape=NA, aes(fill = Disease_History)) +
  geom_jitter(position=position_jitter(width=.1,height=0),aes(fill = Disease_History, colour="black"),size=4, pch=21, colour = "black")+
  labs(x = "Genus", y = "Relative Abundance", fill = "Disease_HIstory") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  facet_wrap(~OTU, labeller = labeller(OTU = custom_labels)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank()) +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(color="black")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(color="black")) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  theme(axis.title.y = element_blank()) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank())

dd_plot_flp_sctld_2
##Make plot

sctld_flp_3<- sctld_flp_melt[sctld_flp_melt$OTU == flp_vs_sctld_asvs[3],]
print(flp_vs_sctld_asvs[3])

custom_labels <- c("TACGGAGGGTGCGAGCGTTAATCGGAATTACTGGGCGTAAAGCGCGCGTAGGCGGTTTGTTAAGTCGGATGTGAAAGCCCCGGGCTCAACCTGGGAACTGCATCCGATACTGGCCGACTAGAGTACGAGAGAGGGAGGTAGAATTCCACGTGTAGCGGTGAAATGCGTAGATATGTGGAGGAATACCAGTGGCGAAGGCGGCCTCCTGGCTCGATACTGACGCTGAGGTGCGAAAGCGTGGGGAGCAAACAGG" = "Halieaceae")

dd_plot_flp_sctld_3<- ggplot(sctld_flp_3, aes(x =Disease_History, y = Abundance, fill = Disease_History)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7,  outlier.shape=NA, aes(fill = Disease_History)) +
  geom_jitter(position=position_jitter(width=.1,height=0),aes(fill = Disease_History, colour="black"),size=4, pch=21, colour = "black")+
  labs(x = "Genus", y = "Relative Abundance", fill = "Disease_HIstory") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  facet_wrap(~OTU, labeller = labeller(OTU = custom_labels)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank()) +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(color="black")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(color="black")) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  theme(axis.title.y = element_blank()) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank())

dd_plot_flp_sctld_3
sctld_flp_4<- sctld_flp_melt[sctld_flp_melt$OTU == flp_vs_sctld_asvs[4],]
print(flp_vs_sctld_asvs[4])

custom_labels <- c("TACGAAGGTCCCAAGCGTTGTTCGGAATCACTGGGCGTAAAGCGTATGTAGGCGGCGTGGAAAGTCAGGTGTGAAAGCCCGGGGCTCAACCCCGGAATTGCACCCGATACTCCCACGCTAGAGTAATGGAGGGGAGTCTGGAATTCACGGTGTAGCAGTGAAATGCGTGGATATCGTGAGGAACACTAGTGGCGAAGGCGAGACTCTGGACATTTACTGACGCTGAGATACGAAGGCTAGGGGAGCGAATGGG" = "Roseibacillus")

dd_plot_flp_sctld_4<- ggplot(sctld_flp_4, aes(x =Disease_History, y = Abundance, fill = Disease_History)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7,  outlier.shape=NA, aes(fill = Disease_History)) +
  geom_jitter(position=position_jitter(width=.1,height=0),aes(fill = Disease_History, colour="black"),size=4, pch=21, colour = "black")+
  labs(x = "Genus", y = "Relative Abundance", fill = "Disease_HIstory") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  facet_wrap(~OTU, labeller = labeller(OTU = custom_labels)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank()) +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(color="black")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(color="black")) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  theme(axis.title.y = element_blank()) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank())

dd_plot_flp_sctld_4
sctld_flp_5<- sctld_flp_melt[sctld_flp_melt$OTU == flp_vs_sctld_asvs[5],]
print(flp_vs_sctld_asvs[5])

custom_labels <- c("TACGTAGGTCCCGAGCGTTATCCGGATTTACTGGGCGTAAAGCGTCCGTAGCTTGGTATGTAAGTCTATTTTTAAAGACTCAGATTCAATCAGAGGAAGGGAATAGATACTGCATATCCTAGAGGATCTTAGAGGTTAGTGGAATTTCCGGTGGAGTGGTGAAATGCGTTGATATCGGAAGGAACGCCGAAAGCGAAAGCAGCTAACTATAATTTTCCTGACAGTGATGGACGAAAGTTTGGGTAGCAAACGGG" = "Absconditabacteriales (SR1)")

dd_plot_flp_sctld_5<- ggplot(sctld_flp_5, aes(x =Disease_History, y = Abundance, fill = Disease_History)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7,  outlier.shape=NA, aes(fill = Disease_History)) +
  geom_jitter(position=position_jitter(width=.1,height=0),aes(fill = Disease_History, colour="black"),size=4, pch=21, colour = "black")+
  labs(x = "Genus", y = "Relative Abundance", fill = "Disease_HIstory") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  facet_wrap(~OTU, labeller = labeller(OTU = custom_labels)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank()) +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(color="black")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(color="black")) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  theme(axis.title.y = element_blank()) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank())

dd_plot_flp_sctld_5
sctld_flp_6<- sctld_flp_melt[sctld_flp_melt$OTU == flp_vs_sctld_asvs[6],]
print(flp_vs_sctld_asvs[6])

custom_labels <- c("TACGAAGGGGGCTAGCGTTGTTCGGAATCACTGGGCGTAAAGCGCGCGTAGGCGGACTTTTAAGTCAGGGGTGAAATCCCGAGGCTCAACCTCGGAACTGCCTTTGATACTGGAAGTCTTGAGTTCGAGAGAGGTGAGTGGAATACCGAGTGTAGAGGTGAAATTCGTAGATATTCGGTGGAACACCAGTGGCGAAGGCGGCTCACTGGCTCGATACTGACGCTGAGGTGCGAAAGCGTGGGGAGCAAACAGG" = "Cohaesibacter")

dd_plot_flp_sctld_6<- ggplot(sctld_flp_6, aes(x =Disease_History, y = Abundance, fill = Disease_History)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7,  outlier.shape=NA, aes(fill = Disease_History)) +
  geom_jitter(position=position_jitter(width=.1,height=0),aes(fill = Disease_History, colour="black"),size=4, pch=21, colour = "black")+
  labs(x = "Genus", y = "Relative Abundance", fill = "Disease_HIstory") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  facet_wrap(~OTU, labeller = labeller(OTU = custom_labels)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank()) +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(color="black")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(color="black")) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  theme(axis.title.y = element_blank()) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank())

dd_plot_flp_sctld_6
combined_plot<- plot_grid(dd_plot_flp_sctld_1, dd_plot_flp_sctld_2, dd_plot_flp_sctld_3, dd_plot_flp_sctld_4,dd_plot_flp_sctld_5,dd_plot_flp_sctld_6, ncol=3, nrow = 2, align="v") +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(b = 15, l=15, unit = "pt"))

combined_plot

final_plot <- ggdraw(combined_plot) +
  draw_label("Health History", x = 0.5, y=0.0, size = 14, vjust = -0.5) +
  draw_label("Relative Abundance", x = 0, y = 0.5, angle = 90, size = 14, vjust = 1.5)

final_plot

pdf("combined_relative_abundance_plots_FLP_vs_SCTLD.pdf", width=8, height=6)
final_plot
dev.off()

#ASVs in DD corals not in HH corals

ps_fs_dd<- subset_samples(ps_f2, Condition=="DD")
ps_f2_DD <- prune_taxa(taxa_sums(ps_fs_dd) > 0, ps_fs_dd)
ps_f2_DD

ps_f2_dd_100 <- phyloseq_filter_prevalence(
  physeq = ps_f2_DD,
  prev.trh = 1.0,  # 100% prevalence threshold
  abund.trh = NULL, # Optional abundance threshold
  threshold_condition = "OR" # Keep taxa meeting either threshold
)
ps_f2_dd_100

asv_vector <- taxa_names(ps_f2_dd_100)

dd_seqs<- names(sequences[sequences %in% asv_vector])

ps_fs_hh<- subset_samples(ps_f2, Condition=="HH")
ps_f2_HH <- prune_taxa(taxa_sums(ps_fs_hh) > 0, ps_fs_hh)
ps_f2_HH

ps_f2_HH_asvs<- taxa_names(ps_f2_HH)

taxa_present <- asv_vector %in% ps_f2_HH_asvs

ps_f2_melt<- psmelt(ps_f2)

ps_f2_melt_1<- ps_f2_melt[ps_f2_melt$OTU == asv_vector[1],]
print(asv_vector[1])

custom_labels <- c("TACGGGAGTGGCAAGCGTTATCCGGAATTATTGGGCGTAAAGCGTCCGCAGGCGGCCCTTCAAGTCTGCTGTTAAAAAGTGGAGCTTAACTCCATCATGGCAGTGGAAACTGTTGGGCTTGAGTGTGGTAGGGGCAGAGGGAATTCCCGGTGTAGCGGTGAAATGCGTAGATATCGGGAAGAACACCAGTGGCGAAGGCGCTCTGCTGGGCCATAACTGACGCTCATGGACGAAAGCCAGGGGAGCGAAAGGG" = "Cohaesibacter")

dd_plot_flp_sctld_6<- ggplot(sctld_flp_6, aes(x =Disease_History, y = Abundance, fill = Disease_History)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7,  outlier.shape=NA, aes(fill = Disease_History)) +
  geom_jitter(position=position_jitter(width=.1,height=0),aes(fill = Disease_History, colour="black"),size=4, pch=21, colour = "black")+
  labs(x = "Genus", y = "Relative Abundance", fill = "Disease_HIstory") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  facet_wrap(~OTU, labeller = labeller(OTU = custom_labels)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank()) +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(color="black")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(color="black")) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  theme(axis.title.y = element_blank()) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank())

dd_plot_flp_sctld_6
ps_f2_melt_2<- ps_f2_melt[ps_f2_melt$OTU == asv_vector[2],]

ps_f2_melt_3<- ps_f2_melt[ps_f2_melt$OTU == asv_vector[3],]

Unique to OATLD

We need to find which ASVs were enriched in Oatld and were indicators of oatld but didn’t match SCTLD bioindicators/

sctld_indicators<- tidy_blast_100_no_repeats

oatld_enriched<- sig_dif_hh_dd
oatld_indics<- dd_ind_asvs_w_tax
#First, create a column of indicator species output that is the ASV sequence
oatld_indics<- rownames_to_column(oatld_indics, var = "ASV")

#Which microbes enriched in OATLD were identical to those in indicator species of lesions?
oatld_microbes<- oatld_enriched[oatld_enriched$ASV %in% oatld_indics$ASV, ]

#Which ones are not found in the BLASTn results of the SCTLD indicators?
oatld_microbes<- oatld_microbes %>% 
  filter(!ASV %in% sctld_indicators$sequence)

print(oatld_microbes$ASV[oatld_microbes$Genus=="Cribrihabitans"])
print(oatld_microbes$ASV[oatld_microbes$Genus=="Ferrimonas"])
print(oatld_microbes$ASV[oatld_microbes$Genus=="Mycoplasma"])
print(oatld_microbes$ASV[oatld_microbes$Genus=="Aurantivirga"])
print(oatld_microbes$ASV[oatld_microbes$Genus=="Micavibrionaceae"])

#Cribrihabitans
print(names(sequences)[which(sequences == "TACGGAGGGGGTTAGCGTTGTTCGGAATTACTGGGCGTAAAGCGCGCGTAGGCGGATTGGAAAGTTGGGGGTGAAATCCCGGGGCTCAACCCCGGAACTGCCTTCAAAACTCCCAGTCTAGAGTTCGAGAGAGGTGAGTGGAATTCCGAGTGTAGAGGTGAAATTCGTAGATATTCGGAGGAACACCAGTGGCGAAGGCGGCTCACTGGCTCGATACTGACGCTGAGGTGCGAAAGTGTGGGGAGCAAACAGG")])

#Ferrimonas
print(names(sequences)[which(sequences == "TACGGAGGGTGCGAGCGTTAATCGGAATCACTGGGCGTAAAGCGCATGCAGGCGGTTTGCTAAGCGAGATGTGAAAGCCCCGGGCTTAACCTGGGAACTGCATTTCGAACTGGCGAACTAGAGTCTTGTAGAGGGGGGTAGAATTTCAGGTGTAGCGGTGAAATGCGTAGAGATCTGAAGGAATACCAGTGGCGAAGGCGGCCCCCTGGACAAAGACTGACGCTCAGATGCGAAAGCGTGGGGAGCAAACAGG")])

#Mycoplasma
print(names(sequences)[which(sequences == "TACATAGGCCCCAAGCGTTATCCGGATTTACTGGGCGTAAAGAGTGCGCAGGTGATTTCACAAGTCTGTATTGAAAGGCTGGAGCTCAACTCCAGTTTGGTATGGAAACTGTGTTATTAGATTATGATAGAGGTTAGCGGAATTCCTAATGTAGCGGTGGAATGCGTAGATATTAGGAGGAACACCAAAAGCGAAGGCAGCTAACTGGGTCATTAATGACACTGGTGCACGAAAGCGTGGGGAGCAAACAGG")])

#Aurantivirga
print(names(sequences)[which(sequences == "TACGGAGGGTGCAAGCGTTATCCGGAATCATTGGGTTTAAAGGGTCCGCAGGCGGTCAATTAAGTCAGAGGTGAAATCCCATAGCTTAACTATGGAACTGCCTTTGATACTGGTTGACTTGAGTTATACGGAAGTAGATAGAATAAGTAGTGTAGCGGTGAAATGCATAGATATTACTTAGAATACCGATTGCGAAGGCAGTCTACTACGTATATACTGACGCTCATGGACGAAAGCGTGGGGAGCGAACAGG")])

#Micavibrionaceae
print(names(sequences)[which(sequences == "TACTGGGGGAGCGAGCGTTGTTCGGAATCACTGGGCGTAAAGCGTGCGCAGGCGGTTTGGAAAGTCAGAAGTGAAATCCCAGAGCTCAACTCTGGAACTGCTTTTGAAACTTCCTTACTAGAGTTTGGTAGAGGTTGGGAGAATTCCTAGTGTAGAGGTGAAATTCGTAGATATTAGGAGGAATACCAGTGGCGTAGGCGCCCAACTGGACCATTACTGACGCTCAGGCACGAAAGCGTGGGGAGCAAACAGG")])

library(cowplot)

combined_plot<- plot_grid(dd_plot_8, dd_plot_9, dd_plot_14, dd_plot_15, dd_plot_19, ncol=3, nrow = 2, align="v") +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(b = 15, l=15, unit = "pt"))

combined_plot

final_plot <- ggdraw(combined_plot) +
  draw_label("Health Condition", x = 0.5, y=0.0, size = 14, vjust = -0.5) +
  draw_label("Relative Abundance", x = 0, y = 0.5, angle = 90, size = 14, vjust = 1.5)

final_plot

pdf("combined_relative_abundance_plots_OATLD_unique_ASVs_updated.pdf", width=8, height=8)
final_plot
dev.off()

#CLAMtest


###############################################
#CLAM Test PS
###############################################
otu_table <- as.data.frame(otu_table(ps_f2_HH_DD_pruned))
sample_data <- as.data.frame(sample_data(ps_f2_HH_DD_pruned))
# Assuming 'group' is a column in your sample data
env_var <- sample_data$Condition
clam_results_ps <- vegan::clamtest(otu_table, env_var, alpha = 0.05, specialization = 2/3)
print(clam_results_ps)

#Attach taxonomic data to ASVs
tax_table <- as.data.frame(tax_table(ps_f2_HH_DD_pruned))

tax_table$Species<- rownames(tax_table)
clam_ps_w_tax<- merge(clam_results_ps, tax_table, by = "Species")

###How many of each group?
#Subset by Generalists
clam_ps_w_tax_gen<- clam_ps_w_tax[clam_ps_w_tax$Classes=="Generalist",]
nrow(clam_ps_w_tax_gen)
[1] 298
#Subset by Healthy Specialists
clam_ps_w_tax_hh<- clam_ps_w_tax[clam_ps_w_tax$Classes=="Specialist_HH",]
nrow(clam_ps_w_tax_hh)
[1] 548
#Subset by Disease Specialists
clam_ps_w_tax_dd<- clam_ps_w_tax[clam_ps_w_tax$Classes=="Specialist_DD",]
nrow(clam_ps_w_tax_dd)
[1] 160
#Subset by Too Rare
clam_ps_w_tax_rare<- clam_ps_w_tax[clam_ps_w_tax$Classes=="Too_rare",]
nrow(clam_ps_w_tax_rare)
[1] 154
print(clam_results_ps)

summary(clam_results_ps)

 1  1

Too_rare          154      0.133
c("DD" = "#d1495b", "HD" = "#edae49", "HH" = "#00798c")
       DD        HD        HH 
"#d1495b" "#edae49" "#00798c" 
colors <- c("Generalist" = "gray",
            "Specialist_HH" = "#00798c", 
            "Specialist_DD" = "#d1495b", 
            "Too_Rare" = "black")

labels<- c("Generalist", "Specialist Healthy", "Specialist Diseased", "Too Rare")

#sig_dif_hh_dd$ASV

x_1<- clam_results_ps$Total_DD[clam_results_ps$Species=="TACGGAGGGGGTTAGCGTTGTTCGGAATTACTGGGCGTAAAGCGCACGTAGGCGGACTGGAAAGTTGGGGGTGAAATCCCGGGGCTCAACCCCGGAACTGCCTCCAAAACTATCAGTCTAGAGTTCGAGAGAGGTGAGTGGAATTCCGAGTGTAGAGGTGAAATTCGTAGATATTCGGAGGAACACCAGTGGCGAAGGCGGCTCACTGGCTCGATACTGACGCTGAGGTGCGAAAGTGTGGGGAGCAAACAGG"] +1

x_17<- clam_results_ps$Total_DD[clam_results_ps$Species=="TACGGAGGGTGCGAGCGTTAATCGGAATTACTGGGCGTAAAGCGCATGCAGGTGGTTCGTTAAGTCAGATGTGAAAGCCCGGGGCTCAACCTCGGAACTGCATTTGAAACTGGCGGACTAGAGTACTGTAGAGGGGGGTAGAATTTCAGGTGTAGCGGTGAAATGCGTAGAGATCTGAAGGAATACCGGTGGCGAAGGCGGCCCCCTGGACAGATACTGACACTCAGATGCGAAAGCGTGGGGAGCAAACAGG"] +1 
y_17<- clam_results_ps$Total_HH[clam_results_ps$Species=="TACGGAGGGTGCGAGCGTTAATCGGAATTACTGGGCGTAAAGCGCATGCAGGTGGTTCGTTAAGTCAGATGTGAAAGCCCGGGGCTCAACCTCGGAACTGCATTTGAAACTGGCGGACTAGAGTACTGTAGAGGGGGGTAGAATTTCAGGTGTAGCGGTGAAATGCGTAGAGATCTGAAGGAATACCGGTGGCGAAGGCGGCCCCCTGGACAGATACTGACACTCAGATGCGAAAGCGTGGGGAGCAAACAGG"] +1

x_18<- clam_results_ps$Total_DD[clam_results_ps$Species=="TACGAAGGTCCCGAGCGTTATTCGGAATCACTGGGCGTAAAGGGAGCGTAGGCTGCGTGGTAAGTCAGATGTGAAAGCCCAGGGCTCAACCCTGGAACTGCATTCGATACTGCCATGCTAGAGTAATGGAGAGGTAGATGGAATTTTCGGTGTAGCAGTGAAATGCGTAGATATCGAAAGGAAGACCAATGGCGAAGGCAATCTACTGGACATTTACTGACGCTGAGGCTCGAAGGCTAGGGGAGCGAAAGGG"] +1 
y_18<- clam_results_ps$Total_HH[clam_results_ps$Species=="TACGAAGGTCCCGAGCGTTATTCGGAATCACTGGGCGTAAAGGGAGCGTAGGCTGCGTGGTAAGTCAGATGTGAAAGCCCAGGGCTCAACCCTGGAACTGCATTCGATACTGCCATGCTAGAGTAATGGAGAGGTAGATGGAATTTTCGGTGTAGCAGTGAAATGCGTAGATATCGAAAGGAAGACCAATGGCGAAGGCAATCTACTGGACATTTACTGACGCTGAGGCTCGAAGGCTAGGGGAGCGAAAGGG"] +1

x_19<- clam_results_ps$Total_DD[clam_results_ps$Species=="TACTGGGGGAGCGAGCGTTGTTCGGAATCACTGGGCGTAAAGCGTGCGCAGGCGGTTTGGAAAGTCAGAAGTGAAATCCCAGAGCTCAACTCTGGAACTGCTTTTGAAACTTCCTTACTAGAGTTTGGTAGAGGTTGGGAGAATTCCTAGTGTAGAGGTGAAATTCGTAGATATTAGGAGGAATACCAGTGGCGTAGGCGCCCAACTGGACCATTACTGACGCTCAGGCACGAAAGCGTGGGGAGCAAACAGG"] +1 
y_19<- clam_results_ps$Total_HH[clam_results_ps$Species=="TACTGGGGGAGCGAGCGTTGTTCGGAATCACTGGGCGTAAAGCGTGCGCAGGCGGTTTGGAAAGTCAGAAGTGAAATCCCAGAGCTCAACTCTGGAACTGCTTTTGAAACTTCCTTACTAGAGTTTGGTAGAGGTTGGGAGAATTCCTAGTGTAGAGGTGAAATTCGTAGATATTAGGAGGAATACCAGTGGCGTAGGCGCCCAACTGGACCATTACTGACGCTCAGGCACGAAAGCGTGGGGAGCAAACAGG"] +1

pdf("CLAM_plot.pdf", width = 8.25, height = 6)
plot(clam_results_ps, xlab = "DD (Abundance + 1)", ylab = "HH (Abundance + 1)", 
     pch = c(1,16,16,1), col=colors, col.lines = c("black", "black", "black"), 
     lty = c(2,2,2), cex=1.5, position = "topleft")
legend("topleft",legend = labels, pch = c(1,16,16,1), col=colors)
text(x=x_1, y=y_1, labels = "Ruegeria", pos=1)
text(x=x_2, y=y_2, labels = "Pseudobacteriovorax", pos=2)
text(x=x_3,y=y_3, labels = "Ruegeria", pos = 1)
text(x=x_4,y=y_4, labels = "Rhodobacteraceae", pos = 4)
text(x=x_5,y=y_5, labels = "Cribrihabitans", pos=2)
text(x=x_6,y=y_6, labels = "Cryomorphaceae", pos=2)
text(x=x_7,y=y_7, labels = "Halarcobacter", pos=2)
text(x=x_8,y=y_8, labels = "Rhodobacteraceae", pos=3)
text(x=x_9,y=y_9, labels = "Thalassobius", pos=2)
text(x=x_10,y=y_10, labels = "Tenacibaculum", pos=2)
text(x=x_11,y=y_11, labels = "Rhodobacteraceae", pos=2)
text(x=x_12,y=y_12, labels = "Ferrimonas", pos=4)
text(x=x_13,y=y_13, labels = "Mycoplasma", pos=2)
text(x=x_14,y=y_14, labels = "Rubritalea", pos=2)
text(x=x_15,y=y_15, labels = "Vibrionaceae", pos=2)
text(x=x_16,y=y_16, labels = "Aurantivirga", pos=2)
text(x=x_17,y=y_17, labels = "Vibrio", pos=2)
text(x=x_18,y=y_18, labels = "Rubritalea", pos=2)
text(x=x_19,y=y_19, labels = "Micavibrionaceae", pos=3)
dev.off()
null device 
          1

For the rest of the OATLD group, we need to get the relative abundance of each of the groups for each sample

ps_f2_ra

#Enterobacterales
ps_enterobacterales <- subset_taxa(ps_f2_ra, Order == "Enterobacterales")
View(ps_enterobacterales@otu_table)
ps_enterobacterales_ras<- as.data.frame(ps_enterobacterales@otu_table)
ps_enterobacterales_ras$RA_Total <- rowSums(ps_enterobacterales_ras)

enterobacterales_ras <- data.frame(
  RowNames = rownames(ps_enterobacterales_ras),
  LastColumn = ps_enterobacterales_ras[, 42]
)

#Flavobacteriales
ps_Flavobacteriales <- subset_taxa(ps_f2_ra, Order == "Flavobacteriales")
View(ps_Flavobacteriales@otu_table)
ps_Flavobacteriales_ras<- as.data.frame(ps_Flavobacteriales@otu_table)
ps_Flavobacteriales_ras$RA_Total <- rowSums(ps_Flavobacteriales_ras)

Flavobacteriales_ras <- data.frame(
  RowNames = rownames(ps_Flavobacteriales_ras),
  LastColumn = ps_Flavobacteriales_ras[, 137]
)
Flavobacteriales_ras$LastColumn <- format(Flavobacteriales_ras, scientific = FALSE)

#Rhodobacterales
ps_Rhodobacterales <- subset_taxa(ps_f2_ra, Order == "Rhodobacterales")
View(ps_Rhodobacterales@otu_table)
ps_Rhodobacterales_ras<- as.data.frame(ps_Rhodobacterales@otu_table)
ps_Rhodobacterales_ras$RA_Total <- rowSums(ps_Rhodobacterales_ras)

Rhodobacterales_ras <- data.frame(
  RowNames = rownames(ps_Rhodobacterales_ras),
  LastColumn = ps_Rhodobacterales_ras[, 76]
)
Rhodobacterales_ras$LastColumn <- format(Rhodobacterales_ras, scientific = FALSE)

#Peptostreptococcales-Tessierellales
ps_Peptostreptococcales_Tessierelales <- subset_taxa(ps_f2_ra, Order == "Peptostreptococcales-Tissierellales")
View(ps_Peptostreptococcales_Tessierelales@otu_table)
ps_Peptostreptococcales_Tessierelales_ras<- as.data.frame(ps_Peptostreptococcales_Tessierelales@otu_table)
ps_Peptostreptococcales_Tessierelales_ras$RA_Total <- rowSums(ps_Peptostreptococcales_Tessierelales_ras)

Peptostreptococcales_Tessierelales_ras <- data.frame(
  RowNames = rownames(ps_Rhodobacterales_ras),
  LastColumn = ps_Rhodobacterales_ras[, 27]
)
Peptostreptococcales_Tessierelales_ras$LastColumn <- format(Peptostreptococcales_Tessierelales_ras, scientific = FALSE)

#Mycoplasmatales
ps_Mycoplasmatales <- subset_taxa(ps_f2_ra, Order == "Mycoplasmatales")
View(ps_Mycoplasmatales@otu_table)
ps_Mycoplasmatales_ras<- as.data.frame(ps_Mycoplasmatales@otu_table)
ps_Mycoplasmatales_ras$RA_Total <- rowSums(ps_Mycoplasmatales_ras)

Mycoplasmatales_ras <- data.frame(
  RowNames = rownames(ps_Mycoplasmatales_ras),
  LastColumn = ps_Mycoplasmatales_ras[, 1]
)
Mycoplasmatales_ras$LastColumn <- format(Mycoplasmatales_ras, scientific = FALSE)

ps_mycoplasmatales <- subset_taxa(ps_f2_ra, Order == "Mycoplasmatales")

#Make the Figures

#Beta Dispersion
p2<-ggplot(dis.condition, aes(x=factor(Condition), y=distance)) +
  geom_boxplot(mapping =aes(x=Condition,y=distance, fill=Condition, color="black"), alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_point(position=position_jitter(width=.1, height=0),aes(colour="black",fill=Condition),size=4, pch=21, colour = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c( "black")) +
  ylab("Distance to Centroid")+
  xlab("Health Condition")+
  guides(color="none") +
  theme_bw()+
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank())+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(colour="black"))+
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(colour="black"))+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14))+
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12))+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16))+
  theme(axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16))+
  theme(strip.text.x=element_text(size=16, face="bold"))+
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = list(c("DD", "HH")),
    method = "t.test",
    label = "p.signif") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("DD" = "D", "HD" = "U", "HH" = "H")) 
p2

ggsave("beta_dispersion.png", plot = p2, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 600)
#Remake Combined PLot of Relative Abundance
library(cowplot)

combined_plot<- plot_grid(dd_plot_8, dd_plot_9, dd_plot_14, dd_plot_15, dd_plot_19, ncol=5, nrow = 1, align="v") +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(b = 30, l=30, unit = "pt"))

combined_plot

final_plot <- ggdraw(combined_plot) +
  draw_label("Health Condition", x = 0.5, y=0.0, size = 14, vjust = -1) +
  draw_label("Relative Abundance", x = 0, y = 0.5, angle = 90, size = 14, vjust = 1.5)

final_plot

pdf("combined_relative_abundance_plots_OATLD_unique_ASVs_updated.pdf", width=11, height=6)
final_plot
dev.off()
#Differential ABundance Figure
ps_f2
ps_f2_HH_DD<- subset_samples(ps_f2, Condition == "HH" | Condition == "DD")
ps_f2_HH_DD

ps_f2_HH_DD_pruned <- prune_taxa(taxa_sums(ps_f2_HH_DD) > 0, ps_f2_HH_DD)
ps_f2_HH_DD_pruned

# Define the order of the conditions for testing
# In this order, the positive fold change values are increased in Diseased Tissue
sample_data(ps_f2_HH_DD_pruned)$Condition<-factor(sample_data(ps_f2_HH_DD_pruned)$Condition,levels=c("HH","DD"))
head(sample_data(ps_f2_HH_DD_pruned)$Condition, 10)

# DESEQ2 analysis on Dcyl Samples
dds = phyloseq_to_deseq2(ps_f2_HH_DD_pruned, ~ Condition)
dds
#filter rows with very few counts
dds <- dds[ rowSums(counts(dds)) > 5, ]
cts <- counts(dds)
geoMeans <- apply(cts, 1, function(row) if (all(row == 0)) 0 else exp(mean(log(row[row != 0]))))
dds <- estimateSizeFactors(dds, geoMeans=geoMeans)
dds <- DESeq(dds,test="Wald", fitType="parametric")
res = results(dds, cooksCutoff = FALSE)
alpha = 0.01
sigtab = res[which(res$padj < alpha), ]
sigtab = cbind(as(sigtab, "data.frame"), as(tax_table(ps)[rownames(sigtab), ], "matrix"))
head(sigtab)
dim(sigtab)
#save table of results
sig = as(sigtab, "matrix")
write.table(sig,"DESeq2_results.txt",sep="\t",col.names=NA)
sig_dif_hh_dd<- read.table("DESeq2_results.txt", header = TRUE)
colnames(sig_dif_hh_dd)[1]<- "ASV"

#Count how many orders
orders<-unique(sig_dif_hh_dd$Order)
print(orders)

cols <- c("Rhodobacterales"="#003049", "Oligoflexales"="#d62828", "Flavobacteriales" = "#f77f00", "Mycoplasmatales" = "#fcbf49", "Verrucomicrobiales" = "#eae2b7", "Enterobacterales" = "#c8553d", "Micavibrionales" = "#588b8b", "Campylobacterales" = "#bc6c25")


#Create Figure for Significantly Different Taxa
pdf("FigureDEtaxa.pdf",width=8,height=6)
p1 <- ggplot(sig_dif_hh_dd,aes(log2FoldChange,Genus,fill=Order))+
  geom_point(size=5, shape=21)+
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin=log2FoldChange-lfcSE, xmax=log2FoldChange+lfcSE),height=0.2)+
  scale_fill_manual(values=cols)+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face="italic"))+
  labs(y= "Lowest Taxonomic Assignment")+
  theme(axis.title=element_text(size=14))+
  theme(legend.text=element_text(size=14))+
  theme(legend.title=element_text(size=16))+
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14, color="black"))+
  theme(legend.position = "right")+
  geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype="dashed") +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-5, 30)) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits= c("Vibrionaceae", "Vibrio", "Thalassobius", "Tenacibaculum", "Ruegeria", "Rubritalea","Rhodobacteraceae", "Pseudobacteriovorax", "Mycoplasma","Micavibrionaceae", "Halarcobacter", "Ferrimonas", "Cryomorphaceae", "Cribrihabitans", "Aurantivirga"),
                   labels= c("Vibrionaceae", expression(italic("Vibrio")), expression(italic("Thalassobius")), 
                             expression(italic("Tenacibaculum")), 
                             expression(italic("Ruegeria")), expression(italic("Rubritalea")), "Rhodobacteraceae",
                             expression(italic("Pseudobacteriovorax")),
                             expression(italic("Mycoplasma")),
                             "Micavibrionaceae", expression(italic("Halarcobacter")), 
                             expression(italic("Ferrimonas")), "Cryomorphaceae",
                             expression(italic("Cribrihabitans")), 
                            expression(italic("Aurantivirga"))))
p1
